name: Dodge Roll
entries: You can expend one {@classFeature Risk|Gunslinger|ValdaGunslinger|2|ValdaGunslinger|Risk Die} as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB} to move up to 15 feet and reload any Ranged weapon you are holding. This movement doesn't provoke {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB|Opportunity Attacks} and is unaffected by {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB}.
